appliedUpdates.description: Fixed unused variable 'sessionUrl' causing typecheck failure

tts-settings-frontend.review: TTS settings section implemented correctly with: voice dropdown showing 6 curated voices (en-US-GuyNeural, en-US-ChristopherNeural, en-US-BrianNeural, en-GB-ThomasNeural, en-US-JennyNeural, en-US-MichelleNeural), rate slider range -50% to +100% with default +25%, pitch slider range -50Hz to +50Hz with default +0Hz. Settings persist via PUT /api/settings on change and are loaded via GET /api/settings on mount.

tts-settings-backend.review: TTS settings backend properly implemented. GET /api/settings returns ttsVoice, ttsRate, ttsPitch. PUT /api/settings validates: voice must be from TTS_VOICES list, rate must match /^([+-]?\d+)%$/ and be between -50 and 100, pitch must match /^([+-]?\d+)Hz$/ and be between -50 and 50. Invalid settings return 400 with descriptive error.

tts-voice-integration.review: TTS voice integration complete. App.tsx calls fetchSettings() on mount to load TTS settings. useTTSStore (Zustand) caches voice/rate/pitch. VoiceControls.speak() retrieves cached settings via useTTSStore.getState() and passes them to voiceAPI.synthesize(). Settings are also updated in store when Settings page saves changes.

stt-settings-backend.review: STT settings backend implemented correctly. GET /api/settings/stt-models returns array of {name, path, sizeMB, memoryMB} for sherpa-onnx models in servers/stt/. POST /api/settings/stt-reload accepts modelDir, validates it exists, and triggers hot-reload via STT service.

stt-hot-reload-impl.review: Hot-reload implementation in servers/stt/server.mjs works correctly. POST /reload accepts {modelDir}, returns 202 immediately, performs reload asynchronously. During reload, /health returns {status: 'reloading', model_loaded: false}. After reload completes, /health returns {status: 'ok', model_loaded: true}. During reload, transcribe returns 503.

stt-settings-frontend.review: STT settings frontend implemented correctly. Dropdown lists models with size (e.g., 'sherpa-onnx-whisper-tiny.en (~40MB RAM)'). Warning banner appears when switching to larger model. Reload Model button triggers POST /api/settings/stt-reload. Loading spinner shown during reload (aria-busy=true). Error toast on failure. Previous model remains active if reload fails.

stt-model-integration.review: STT model integration complete. VoiceControls uses voiceAPI.transcribe() which proxies to /api/stt/transcribe. The STT service proxies to sherpa-onnx server on port 8765. After model reload, new transcriptions use the reloaded model automatically since the STT server handles model switching internally.

notes: Subagent spawning failed due to model configuration issues ('Invalid model: custom:minimax-m2.7'). Performed direct code review instead. All implementation appears correct and complete.
